_help.targets: Consumer profile id(s) to check tool definitions against. [] = pure MCP-spec checks only (fully provider-agnostic, the default if omitted). Multiple ids = portable intersection (a tool must satisfy ALL).
_help.portable: true = check against every profile in profilesDir (equivalent to targeting all). Or target the precomputed 'generic-strict' profile.
_help.mode: 'default' or 'strict'. 'strict' additionally applies each profile's strict{} block (e.g. OpenAI additionalProperties:false + all-required).
_help.rules: Per-rule severity overrides: error | warn | info | off.
